subject: Accountancy
chapter: Trial Balance and Rectification of Errors

questions.q: The following Trial Balance of XYZ Ltd. is given below. Prepare a balance sheet as on 31st March, 2023.
Identify the errors in the following Trial Balance: (i) Debit balance of 'Discount on Debtors' ₹ 1,500, (ii) Credit balance of 'Profit and Loss for the year' ₹ 20,000.

A Trial Balance is prepared on 31st March, 2023. The following errors were discovered in the Trial Balance: (i) 'Rent and Taxes' was overcast by ₹ 2,000, (ii) 'Commission Received' was undercast by ₹ 4,000. Prepare a corrected Trial Balance.
State with reasons, when a Trial Balance is not a true and correct position of the books of accounts.
questions.answer: When a Trial Balance is not a true and correct position of the books of accounts

questions.q: Identify the following errors in the following Trial Balance: (i) 'Bank Overdraft' has a debit balance of ₹ 25,000, (ii) 'Dividend Received' has a credit balance of ₹ 5,000.

The following Trial Balance of ABC Ltd. is given below. Prepare a corrected Trial Balance after rectifying the errors: (i) 'Commission Received' ₹ 12,000 was credited to 'Commission Expenses' ₹ 12,000, (ii) 'Rent and Taxes' ₹ 24,000 was debited to 'Rent Received' ₹ 24,000.
State with reasons, the circumstances under which a Trial Balance is prepared.
questions.answer: Circumstances under which a Trial Balance is prepared

questions.q: Identify the following errors in the following Trial Balance: (i) 'Capital' has a debit balance of ₹ 1,00,000, (ii) 'Profit and Loss for the year' has a credit balance of ₹ 20,000.

The following Trial Balance of XYZ Ltd. is given below. Prepare a corrected Trial Balance after rectifying the errors: (i) 'Discount Received' ₹ 6,000 was debited to 'Discount on Debtors' ₹ 6,000, (ii) 'Interest Received' ₹ 18,000 was credited to 'Interest Expenses' ₹ 18,000.
State with reasons, the importance of a Trial Balance.

A Trial Balance is prepared on 31st March, 2023. The following errors were discovered in the Trial Balance: (i) 'Salaries' was undercast by ₹ 8,000, (ii) 'Commission Received' was overcast by ₹ 6,000. Prepare a corrected Trial Balance.
